name: career-simulator
description: AI Career Transition & Real-World Experience Simulator

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @career-sim/api" "npm run dev -w @career-sim/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @career-sim/shared && npm run build -w @career-sim/api && npm run build -w @career-sim/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @career-sim/shared && npm run build -w @career-sim/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @career-sim/shared && npm run build -w @career-sim/web
